title: Credit Card Product Schema
description: Schema for supported credit card products (Chase, Amex, Capital One)

id.description: Unique identifier for the card product (e.g., 'chase_freedom_flex', 'amex_gold')

name.description: Display name of the card (e.g., 'Chase Freedom Flex', 'American Express Gold Card')

reward_unit.description: How rewards are earned: as cashback percentage or as points/miles multiplier

reward_currency.description: For points_multiplier cards: the name of the reward currency (e.g., 'Ultimate Rewards', 'Membership Rewards', 'Miles')

base_earn_rate.description: Base earn rate for non-category purchases. For cashback: percentage. For points: multiplier.

reward_rules.description: Array of reward rules for different categories or merchants

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for this rule within the card

categories.description: Merchant categories this rule applies to (from the category enum)

earn_rate.description: Reward rate for this rule. For cashback: %. For points: multiplier.

earn_type.description: Type of earn rate (should match card's reward_unit)

merchant_specific.description: Specific merchant IDs where this rule takes precedence over category rules

quarterly_rotating.description: Whether this is a rotating quarterly category (e.g., Chase Freedom)

activation_required.description: Whether user must activate this category to earn the bonus rate

current_quarter_categories.description: Categories included in the current active quarter

excluded_merchants.description: Merchant IDs explicitly excluded from this rule

excluded_categories.description: Categories explicitly excluded from this rule (e.g., WHOLESALE_CLUBS excluded from Amex Gold 4x grocery)

source_url.description: Public issuer page where this rule is documented

source_last_verified.description: When the source page was last checked and verified (ISO 8601)

notes.description: Additional notes about this rule (edge cases, clarifications, etc.)
